Attached Element Context from Integrated Browser

Element: div.relative.w-full.rounded-lg.border.p-4.[&amp;&gt;svg~*]:pl-7.[&amp;&gt;svg]:absolute.[&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4.[&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4.[&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground.border-destructive/50.text-destructive.dark:text-red-400.bg-red-50.dark:bg-red-950/20

Inner Text:
```text
Login failed.
```

Outer HTML:
```html
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border p-4 [&amp;&gt;svg~*]:pl-7 [&amp;&gt;svg]:absolute [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground border-destructive/50 text-destructive dark:text-red-400 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/20"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-circle-x h-4 w-4"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><path d="m15 9-6 6"></path><path d="m9 9 6 6"></path></svg><div class="text-sm [&amp;_p]:leading-relaxed">Login failed.</div></div>
```

Full Computed CSS:
```css

/* Matched Rule from user-agent */
div {
  display: block;
}

/* Matched Rule from user-agent */
address, blockquote, center, div, figure, figcaption, footer, form, header, hr, legend, listing, main, p, plaintext, pre, summary, xmp, article, aside, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, hgroup, nav, section, search, table, caption, colgroup, col, thead, tbody, tfoot, tr, td, th, dir, dd, dl, dt, menu, ol, ul, li, bdi, output, [dir="ltr" i], [dir="rtl" i], [dir="auto" i] {
  unicode-bidi: isolate;
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
*, ::before, ::after {
  --tw-border-spacing-x: 0;
  --tw-border-spacing-y: 0;
  --tw-translate-x: 0;
  --tw-translate-y: 0;
  --tw-rotate: 0;
  --tw-skew-x: 0;
  --tw-skew-y: 0;
  --tw-scale-x: 1;
  --tw-scale-y: 1;
  --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity;
  --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px;
  --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff;
  --tw-ring-color: rgb(59 130 246 / 0.5);
  --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-border-spacing-x: 0;
  --tw-border-spacing-y: 0;
  --tw-translate-x: 0;
  --tw-translate-y: 0;
  --tw-rotate: 0;
  --tw-skew-x: 0;
  --tw-skew-y: 0;
  --tw-scale-x: 1;
  --tw-scale-y: 1;
  --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity;
  --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px;
  --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff;
  --tw-ring-color: rgb(59 130 246 / 0.5);
  --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000;
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
*, ::before, ::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border-width: 0;
  border-style: solid;
  border-color: #e5e7eb;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  border-top-width: 0px;
  border-right-width: 0px;
  border-bottom-width: 0px;
  border-left-width: 0px;
  border-top-style: solid;
  border-right-style: solid;
  border-bottom-style: solid;
  border-left-style: solid;
  border-top-color: rgb(229, 231, 235);
  border-right-color: rgb(229, 231, 235);
  border-bottom-color: rgb(229, 231, 235);
  border-left-color: rgb(229, 231, 235);
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
* {
  border-color: hsl(var(--border));
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.relative {
  position: relative;
  position: relative;
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.w-full {
  width: 100%;
  width: 100%;
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.rounded-lg {
  border-radius: var(--radius);
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.border {
  border-width: 1px;
  border-top-width: 1px;
  border-right-width: 1px;
  border-bottom-width: 1px;
  border-left-width: 1px;
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.border-destructive\/50 {
  border-color: hsl(var(--destructive) / 0.5);
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.bg-red-50 {
  --tw-bg-opacity: 1;
  background-color: rgb(254 242 242 / var(--tw-bg-opacity, 1));
  --tw-bg-opacity: 1;
  background-color: rgb(254 242 242 / var(--tw-bg-opacity, 1));
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.p-4 {
  padding: 1rem;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  padding-right: 1rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
  padding-left: 1rem;
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.text-destructive {
  color: hsl(var(--destructive));
  color: hsl(var(--destructive));
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.dark\:bg-red-950\/20:is(.dark *) {
  background-color: rgb(69 10 10 / 0.2);
  background-color: rgba(69, 10, 10, 0.2);
}

/* Matched Rule from regular */
.dark\:text-red-400:is(.dark *) {
  --tw-text-opacity: 1;
  color: rgb(248 113 113 / var(--tw-text-opacity, 1));
  --tw-text-opacity: 1;
  color: rgb(248 113 113 / var(--tw-text-opacity, 1));
}

/* Inherited from ancestor level 1 (user-agent) */
div {
  display: block;
}

/* Inherited from ancestor level 1 (user-agent) */
address, blockquote, center, div, figure, figcaption, footer, form, header, hr, legend, listing, main, p, plaintext, pre, summary, xmp, article, aside, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, hgroup, nav, section, search, table, caption, colgroup, col, thead, tbody, tfoot, tr, td, th, dir, dd, dl, dt, menu, ol, ul, li, bdi, output, [dir="ltr" i], [dir="rtl" i], [dir="auto" i] {
  unicode-bidi: isolate;
}

/* Inherited from ancestor level 1 (regular) */
*, ::before, ::after {
  --tw-border-spacing-x: 0;
  --tw-border-spacing-y: 0;
  --tw-translate-x: 0;
  --tw-translate-y: 0;
  --tw-rotate: 0;
  --tw-skew-x: 0;
  --tw-skew-y: 0;
  --tw-scale-x: 1;
  --tw-scale-y: 1;
  --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity;
  --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px;
  --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff;
  --tw-ring-color: rgb(59 130 246 / 0.5);
  --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-border-spacing-x: 0;
  --tw-border-spacing-y: 0;
  --tw-translate-x: 0;
  --tw-translate-y: 0;
  --tw-rotate: 0;
  --tw-skew-x: 0;
  --tw-skew-y: 0;
  --tw-scale-x: 1;
  --tw-scale-y: 1;
  --tw-scroll-snap-strictness: proximity;
  --tw-ring-offset-width: 0px;
  --tw-ring-offset-color: #fff;
  --tw-ring-color: rgb(59 130 246 / 0.5);
  --tw-ring-offset-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-ring-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-shadow: 0 0 #0000;
  --tw-shadow-colored: 0 0 #0000;
}

  box-sizing: border-box;

  border-bottom-width: 0px;

    transform 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(18px);
  transition-behavior: normal, normal;
  transition-duration: 0.55s, 0.55s;
  transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1);
  transition-delay: 0s, 0s;
  transition-property: opacity, transform;
}

  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
  transition-delay: 0.12s;
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0px);
  transition-delay: 0.12s;

/* Inherited from ancestor level 7 (regular) */
:root {
  --background: 0 0% 100%;
  --foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --card: 0 0% 100%;
  --card-foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --popover: 0 0% 100%;
  --popover-foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --primary: 221.2 83.2% 53.3%;
  --primary-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --secondary: 210 40% 96.1%;
  --secondary-foreground: 222.2 47.4% 11.2%;
  --muted: 210 40% 96.1%;
  --muted-foreground: 215.4 16.3% 40%;
  --accent: 210 40% 96.1%;
  --accent-foreground: 222.2 47.4% 11.2%;
  --destructive: 0 84.2% 60.2%;
  --destructive-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --border: 214.3 31.8% 78%;
  --input: 214.3 31.8% 78%;
  --ring: 221.2 83.2% 53.3%;
  --radius: 0.5rem;
  --background: 0 0% 100%;
  --foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --card: 0 0% 100%;
  --card-foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --popover: 0 0% 100%;
  --popover-foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --primary: 221.2 83.2% 53.3%;
  --primary-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --secondary: 210 40% 96.1%;
  --secondary-foreground: 222.2 47.4% 11.2%;
  --muted: 210 40% 96.1%;
  --muted-foreground: 215.4 16.3% 40%;
  --accent: 210 40% 96.1%;
  --accent-foreground: 222.2 47.4% 11.2%;
  --destructive: 0 84.2% 60.2%;
  --destructive-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --border: 214.3 31.8% 78%;
  --input: 214.3 31.8% 78%;
  --ring: 221.2 83.2% 53.3%;
  --radius: 0.5rem;
}

/* Inherited from ancestor level 7 (regular) */
.dark {
  --background: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --card: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --card-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --popover: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --popover-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --primary: 217.2 91.2% 59.8%;
  --primary-foreground: 222.2 47.4% 11.2%;
  --secondary: 217.2 32.6% 17.5%;
  --secondary-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --muted: 217.2 32.6% 17.5%;
  --muted-foreground: 215 20.2% 65.1%;
  --accent: 217.2 32.6% 17.5%;
  --accent-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --destructive: 0 62.8% 30.6%;
  --destructive-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --border: 217.2 32.6% 30%;
  --input: 217.2 32.6% 30%;
  --ring: 224.3 76.3% 48%;
  --radius: 0.5rem;
  --background: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --foreground: 210 40% 98%;

  --card-foreground: 210 40% 98%;

```
